data_migration.notes: No migration; the evaluator reads existing committed indexes and optional caller-supplied local records.

risks: Governed indexes may become stale if regeneration is skipped
Optional execution/evidence inputs have no full linkage contract
Advisory recommendations could be mistaken for implementation authority
Legacy state concepts must not be promoted as controller behavior
external_interfaces: No network, provider, credential, subprocess, deployment, scheduling, publication, messaging, or tool connection
approval_changes: RTS-FRZ-000005 alone receives APPROVED build authority and a human-approved selection lifecycle
RTS-FRZ-000006 and RTS-FRZ-000007 remain NOT_APPROVED and unimplemented
existing_assumptions: Committed FREEZER and Asset Manifest indexes are the governed default inputs
The minimal execution_record and evidence_ref contracts remain structural only
Normal evaluation writes only canonical JSON to stdout
rationale: The implementation is bounded to a deterministic local evaluator, schema, example, tests and CI. It cannot mutate governed inputs or adjacent repositories, has no external interfaces or credentials, and grants no controller or write authority.
affected_boundaries: FREEZER item, assessment, Preflight, indexes and manifest
governed CI path filters and validation
rollback_boundary: Revert PR #230; no adjacent repository, external service, credential, deployment, publication or customer state is mutated.
hidden_dependencies: FREEZER item and Build Assessment fingerprints must remain current across status-only lifecycle revisions
Manifest hashes must be regenerated after every tracked FREEZER file change
loop_core defaults depend on semantically fresh items and build-priority indexes
completion_conditions: Read-only evaluation is deterministic for identical inputs and arguments
Governed input hashes remain unchanged after evaluation
Output validates against the committed schema and authority is ADVISORY_ONLY
RTS-FRZ-000005 has current BUILD_NOW assessment and PASS Preflight
Lifecycle records show SELECTED, IN_PROGRESS, VERIFIED and COMPLETED
RTS-FRZ-000006 and RTS-FRZ-000007 remain NOT_APPROVED and FROZEN
All required validation and Unicode Guard pass
